sections.paragraph:
Original: לבט

Transliteration: lâbaṭ

Phonetic: law-bat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to throw down, thrust down, thrust out, thrust away
    1. (Niphal) to be thrust down, be thrust away, be thrown down, be cast aside

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1072

Part(s) of speech: Verb
